title: Theodore M. Burton
extract: Theodore Moyle Burton was a general authority of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and one of the main leaders of the church's Genealogical Department in the 1960s. Under his direction the department expanded its operations, largely through the opening of many more Family History Centers.
extract_html: Theodore Moyle Burton was a general authority of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and one of the main leaders of the church's Genealogical Department in the 1960s.
